docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $40. SERVED FEB-17-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LACEY, COLIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2023 BY VISITING JUDGE HUSING. PLAINTIFF SOPHIA BARTOLOMEO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COLIN LACEY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA L. HUSING; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE MAY-01-2023 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAIL TO PLAINTIFF(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARTOLOMEO, SOPHIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LACEY, COLIN $1,267.17 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,337.17, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $1267.17 SECURITY DEPOSIT. THE DEFENDANT AGREED TO NOVEMBER 1, 2022 AS THE MOVE OUT DATE, WAIVING THE THE 30 DAYS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,267.17 FILED BY BARTOLOMEO, SOPHIA AS TO DEFENDANT LACEY, COLIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2023 - JUDGMENT.
